plan.title: Study plan

assessments.genTitle: Generate a unit test with AI
assessments.genHint: Generates questions from the unit's objectives → you review and approve → the student takes it and it's auto-graded, moving the unit's objective values (percent key).
assessments.reviewQuestions: Review the questions ({n}) — the correct answer is marked ✓:
assessments.approve: Approve — makes it available to the student
assessments.waitingStudent: Waiting for the student to take it; the result will appear here automatically.
assessments.noWhatsapp: No WhatsApp number for the guardian to share.

progress.skillsTitle: Four skills — average across started units
progress.skillsNote: A petal = the average of that skill's objective scores across started units (an un-assessed objective counts as seed). Speaking is rated by the teacher. “Building Blocks” is a separate track.
progress.noAssessments: No assessments yet — rate the first objective of a unit to start its bloom.

hero.title: Your child's English journey, blooming step by step
hero.sub: We grow your child's English through a journey designed for them alone — the Ward Curriculum, measured by the global CEFR standard. A dedicated teacher in live 1:1 sessions, and a plan built from a real diagnosis of their level and goal. Ages 9–13.

steps.d: We build a clear picture from the sign-up form, a gentle placement test, the trial session, and the expert teacher's notes — where they are now, where we're heading, and how long it takes.

steps.t: A personal plan on the Ward Curriculum (CEFR)
steps.d: AI drafts a detailed plan around their goal and timeframe — an intensive summer goal or a longer path — sequencing the content and number of sessions, all under the teacher's supervision and approval.
The same dedicated teacher week by week, and real numbers reach you: what they truly mastered, and what still needs care.

trust.title: One teacher, one child — every session
trust.sub: Every session is private and one-to-one: your child's full hour of attention, at their own pace, around what they love. The same dedicated teacher follows their journey week after week and shapes each lesson to how they're really doing.
points: The same dedicated teacher, every week
Lessons tailored to your child's pace and goals

ai.title: Smart support that makes every session go further
ai.sub: Behind your child's teacher is thoughtful AI — and your child gets a helping hand too. By supporting both the teacher and the student, it turns every session into more real progress.

points.d: AI helps the teacher build personalized lessons, practice and progress reports in a fraction of the time — so their energy stays on teaching your child.
Between sessions, your child gets practice matched to their exact level, and instant, friendly help the moment they need it.
When a dedicated teacher and smart tools work together, progress compounds — and your child reaches their goals sooner.

showcase.title: A peek inside
showcase.sub: Everything you and your child see — calm, clear, and made for focus.

items.title: Your child's progress, always in view
items.desc: Open your account to a living progress report, a short summary after every session, and what's coming next.
points: A short report after every session
Live progress you can actually read

points: The same teacher, face to face

teacher.reviewNote: Nothing reaches the student before you approve

bloomReport.title: Watch their English bloom, skill by skill
bloomReport.sub: Each petal is a skill. As your child grows, their flower opens — so progress is something you can see, not just numbers on a page.

session.title: What a live session looks like
session.sub: Calm, personal, and focused on your child — one teacher, one child, face to face.
session.caption: “Let's read Unit 4 together.”

outcomes.title: Families are already seeing the difference
outcomes.sub: Real momentum, from the very first weeks.

stats.label: parents see more confidence within 6 weeks

pricing.title: Choose how often your child learns
pricing.sub: Every plan gives your child the same full experience — the only difference is how many sessions a week. Cancel anytime.
features: Live 1:1 sessions with a dedicated teacher
A short report after every session
A live progress report in your account
Homework set and checked by the teacher
pricing.note: Prices in USD · No card needed for the trial

testimonials.title: Parents see the difference
testimonials.sub: Real families, real change — confidence first.

items.quote: My son used to freeze up in English. One-to-one with the same teacher every week, he's finally speaking with confidence.
items.name: Mona A.

items.quote: I get a short report after every single session, so I always know what my daughter learned and what's coming next. No guessing.
items.name: Yusuf K.

items.quote: Every lesson is built around my son — his level, his interests. The extra practice between sessions keeps him moving faster than I expected.
items.name: Layla H.

faq.title: Questions parents ask
faq.sub: Everything you want to know before the first session.

items.a: Live 1:1 sessions are 45 minutes — long enough to grow, short enough to stay fun and focused.
We teach children ages 9 to 13, matched to the right level after a gentle placement test.

items.q: What if my child is shy?
items.a: That's exactly who we're built for. One steady teacher, one child, and no class to perform in front of — confidence grows session by session.

items.q: What do we need to start?
items.a: Just a laptop or tablet with a camera and internet. We send a simple link — nothing to install.
Yes. Plans are monthly — you can pause or cancel whenever you like, with no long contracts.
A real, qualified teacher — the same one every week. They plan each lesson, guide your child personally, and check their homework and progress themselves.

final.title: Start with a free trial session
final.sub: Meet the teacher and see the platform from the inside.

footer.tagline: Confident English for ages 9–13 — teacher-led, AI-supported.
footer.copyright: Ward Academy © 2026 · Parental consent required for every account

enrollForm.confirmBody: We've received your request and emailed you a confirmation. The teacher will prepare a short placement test and send it to you on WhatsApp before the session; afterwards they'll set up both accounts and send you the login link.
enrollForm.bookSub: Pick a time that works for you from the teacher's openings.
enrollForm.regTitle: Register your child at Ward Academy
enrollForm.regSub: A three-step form, then book a free trial — no account needed yet.
